claims.description: The root causes and learner-only production fixes are identified at the deterministic matcher, clarification announcement, and responsive layout boundaries.

Behavior-first rework coverage proves exact photosynthesis raw input, all three modified unsupported destinations, repeated native announcements, and the production-consumed interactive 360px layout contract.
The original immutable RED, GREEN, production-only REVERT, and RESTORE proof remains preserved and is extended with honestly labeled rework-cycle proof.
The implementation plan records concrete routing, rawInput, clarification revision, deterministic jump, layout, announcement, verification, and deferred-scope decisions.
